notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: White Sox challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Ryan Vilade steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Cedric Mullins plunked
notableEvents.detail: Cedric Mullins hit by pitch. Nick Fortes to 3rd. Junior Caminero to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cedric Mullins reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Cedric Mullins reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Chase Meidroth.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Hicks intentionally walks Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Richie Palacios pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Richie Palacios singles on a ground ball to catcher Edgar Quero, deflected by pitcher Jordan Hicks. Cedric Mullins to 3rd. Jonathan Aranda to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Richie Palacios pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Richie Palacios singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci, deflected by third baseman Miguel Vargas. Cedric Mullins scores. Yandy Díaz to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jake Fraley pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Fraley challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Jake Fraley called out on strikes.
